name: Nino Chavez Blueprint
tagline: Brownfield audit + redesign of ninochavez.co. Diagnosed, prescribed, designed, now prototyped — Stage 4 of 7.

flows.label: Peer Architect arrival
flows.summary: P1 lands on / via referral or Signal Dispatch post → scans capability sentence + live signals → opens /ai or a building receipt → bookmarks / RSS-subscribes.

flows.label: Prospective Client arrival
flows.summary: P2 lands on / via LinkedIn or referral → scans capability sentence in buyer language → clicks 'Schedule a conversation' → enters Cal.com booking flow.
